llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 14.1, 14.2, 14.3, 14.4, and 14.7 were moved to consent agenda. These are: Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 1313 - Civility; Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 5141.4 - Child Abuse Prevention and Reporting; Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 5145.9 - Hate Motivated Behavior; Approval of Agreement between the Redwood City School District and United Through Education, Inc. for Newcomer Families for the 2021-22 School Year; and Approval of Personnel Changes for 2021-22.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? So moved. Second. Maria and Mike with a second roll call vote.
